scripts.spacetime:dev: set NO_PROXY=127.0.0.1,localhost&& D:\ProgramFiles\SpacetimeDB\spacetime.exe dev continuum-grid --project-path . --module-bindings-path client/module_bindings --client-lang typescript --yes --server-only
scripts.spacetime:publish:local: set NO_PROXY=127.0.0.1,localhost&& D:\ProgramFiles\SpacetimeDB\spacetime.exe publish --module-path spacetimedb --server local --yes
scripts.spacetime:generate: set NO_PROXY=127.0.0.1,localhost&& D:\ProgramFiles\SpacetimeDB\spacetime.exe generate continuum-grid --lang typescript --out-dir client/module_bindings --module-path spacetimedb --yes
